vibe: Warm, homey, cozy, friendly, approachable, trustworthy

buttons.primary: bg-[#8A9A7A] text-white hover:bg-[#788769] rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#C58B71] text-white hover:bg-[#B37A60] rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#E8E4DF] text-[#3E3A37] hover:border-[#8A9A7A] hover:bg-[#FAF9F6] rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.ghost: text-[#76706A] hover:text-[#3E3A37] hover:bg-[#F4F3ED] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200

inputs.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#E8E4DF] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#3E3A37] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#8A9A7A] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#8A9A7A]/10 transition-all duration-200 placeholder:text-[#A39E98]
inputs.label: block text-sm font-semibold text-[#3E3A37] mb-2

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(62,58,55,0.04)] border border-[#E8E4DF]/50 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(62,58,55,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm border-2 border-[#E8E4DF] hover:border-[#8A9A7A] cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 group relative overflow-hidden

progress_indicator.container: flex items-center justify-between relative max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-12
progress_indicator.step: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm z-10 transition-all duration-300
progress_indicator.step_active: bg-[#8A9A7A] text-white shadow-md ring-4 ring-[#8A9A7A]/20 scale-110
progress_indicator.bar: absolute top-1/2 left-0 w-full h-1.5 -translate-y-1/2 bg-[#F4F3ED] rounded-full z-0
progress_indicator.bar_fill: absolute top-1/2 left-0 h-1.5 -translate-y-1/2 bg-[#8A9A7A] rounded-full z-0 transition-all duration-500 ease-out

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full bg-[#FAF9F6]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E8E4DF] py-4
navigation.brand: font-heading font-bold text-2xl tracking-tight text-[#3E3A37] flex items-center gap-2

images.description: A beagle comfortably lays on a dog bed in a warm, stylish living room setting. Perfect for the main landing page hero section.
A cozy, minimalist warm living room interior. Great for the 'How it works' or features section background.
Abstract beige sand ripples. Perfect for a very subtle, low-opacity (e.g. opacity-10) full-page background in the form builder or public view to give a natural, organic feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast_requirements: All text must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1 ratio). Ensure the white text on primary/secondary buttons is legible.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="next-step-button"`).
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All inputs and buttons must have visible focus rings (`focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#8A9A7A]/20`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for headings and Nunito for body text. Make sure to import them via Google Fonts.
The application should feel warm, personal, and trustworthy. Avoid standard 'SaaS' cold aesthetics (no sharp corners, no pure blue, no pure black).
For the Multi-Step form builder, use progressive disclosure. Ensure smooth transitions between steps. Use the pebble-style progress indicator.
Use generous padding (p-8 or p-10) inside form cards.
Apply `rounded-3xl` for main cards and `rounded-full` for all buttons.
For the Pet Selection cards (Step 3) and Tasks (Step 5), use interactive cards with large icons, soft borders, and a selected state with a thicker #8A9A7A border and subtle background tint.
The public shareable view (for the sitter) should be beautiful and read-only. It should not look like a form to fill out, but rather a digital, cozy 'care instruction manual'.
Use the provided image URLs in their respective sections to elevate the visual appeal.
Use lucide-react for icons, choosing rounded, soft variants where possible (e.g., Heart, Home, Calendar, PawPrint (if available, otherwise use Bone/Dog/Cat), CheckCircle2).
Include a `data-testid` attribute on all interactive elements to support automated testing.
